milestones.title: Repository initialized with Codex harness
milestones.description: Root harness files, shared docs, and all module documentation skeletons exist in the repository.
milestones.evidence: Root AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/*.md, shared/types.py, module docs, and init.sh exist. 2026-04-27 update: LoRA was brought into the same root-level harness layout with AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, SETUP.md, requirements.txt, and feature_list.json.
gate: Root AGENTS.md exists
All four modules contain AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, FEATURES.md, SETUP.md, and feature_list.json
docs/INTERFACES.md defines all cross-module contracts
init.sh exists and passes bash syntax check

milestones.title: Modules runnable in isolation with mock-friendly setup
milestones.description: Each module can bootstrap its own environment and document a mock strategy before integration.
milestones.evidence: 2026-04-27: Frontend dependencies installed with `cd frontend && npm install` and verified with `npm run build`. Chatbot uses `chatbot/.venv`, installed `requirements.txt`, and passed `USE_MOCK=true .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (17 passed). LoRA uses `lora/.venv`, installed minimal harness `requirements.txt`, passed `.venv/bin/python -m compileall src scripts`, shell syntax checks, and `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (4 passed). RAG continues to use `rag/.venv` and passed `.venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests` (19 tests).
gate: Frontend local startup command documented and runnable
Chatbot supports USE_MOCK=true
LoRA setup and storage locations are documented
RAG setup and Milvus local bootstrap are documented

milestones.title: Interfaces finalized and shared types aligned
milestones.description: Provider and consumer teams agree on all payloads, return shapes, and shared enums.
milestones.evidence: 2026-04-27: No changes were required to `docs/INTERFACES.md` or `shared/types.py`. Frontend now adapts Chatbot REST response shapes without changing the contract. LoRA mock/fallback wrappers return `shared/types.py` dataclasses for `SentimentResult` and `GenerationResult`.
gate: No unresolved type conflicts between docs/INTERFACES.md and shared/types.py
DocumentSource includes all RAG source categories
Mock behavior is documented for every consumed interface

milestones.title: LoRA and RAG integration-ready
milestones.description: Both provider modules expose real interfaces usable by Chatbot without mock mode.
milestones.evidence: RAG is integration-ready at module level with real Milvus/BGE retrieval evidence. 2026-04-28: LoRA provider readiness verified through the AutoDL OpenAI-compatible vLLM tunnel: direct `predict_sentiment` returned normalized Bullish sentiment and `generate_response` returned non-empty `ift-lora` text. Local wrapper preserves the shared Python interface and uses local-only env vars for endpoint/auth.
gate: LoRA interface functions callable with documented inputs
RAG interface functions callable with documented inputs
Provider verification evidence recorded in module trackers

milestones.title: Chatbot integrated with real providers
milestones.description: Chatbot disables mocks and completes end-to-end pipeline execution using real LoRA and RAG interfaces.
milestones.evidence: 2026-04-27: Chatbot mock-first API is verified with module tests and E2E HTTP checks. 2026-04-28: Chatbot `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=true LLM_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false` was verified against AutoDL LoRA and returned reply, sentiment, entity, and mock RAG sources. 2026-04-28 full no-mock preparation added package-compatible RAG imports, real Milvus collection probing in `/api/health`, full provider startup documentation, and `scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py`. 2026-04-29: Full real-provider Chatbot mode passed with `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=false LLM_BACKEND=lora LORA_USE_MOCK=false`; `python scripts/verify_full_no_mock_e2e.py` returned `full no-mock e2e ok`, RAG reported `documents_indexed=1961` in collection `cryptopulse_rag_hybrid_bge_m3_bm25`, and `/api/chat` returned LoRA sentiment/reply plus 5 real RAG sources. 2026-05-08: Full real-provider Chatbot mode with `NER_BACKEND=lora` passed the 14-case routing matrix with 14/14; `/api/health` reported `lora.status=ok`, `rag.status=ok`, and `ner.backend=lora`.
gate: USE_MOCK=false path verified
/api/chat returns reply, sentiment, entities, and sources
/api/health reports lora and rag as ok

milestones.title: Frontend end-to-end integration
milestones.description: Frontend runs against the real Chatbot API and covers the main chat flow and dashboard summary flow.
milestones.evidence: 2026-04-27: Frontend build passes and can run against the local Chatbot API with `VITE_USE_MOCK=false`. Mock-first E2E verified `Frontend -> Chatbot REST` reachability through `python scripts/verify_mock_first_e2e.py`, but the backend was still in `USE_MOCK=true`. 2026-04-29: Full no-mock E2E script confirmed the Frontend dev shell was reachable at `http://127.0.0.1:5173` while Chatbot was running real RAG plus real AutoDL LoRA. Browser walkthrough passed: Dashboard showed `ok · lora: ok, rag: ok, ner: ok`, the `90 Days` filter refreshed real summary data, and Chat showed a real answer with sentiment and RAG source snippets.
gate: Frontend chat UI sends requests to the real API
Sentiment summary page consumes backend data
User-visible failure states are handled

milestones.title: Demo-ready full-system flow
milestones.description: Full system works without mocks and is ready for evaluation and presentation.
milestones.evidence: 2026-04-27: A reproducible mock-first E2E verification script was added and passed while Chatbot and Frontend dev servers were running. 2026-04-28: real AutoDL LoRA plus mock RAG Chatbot API path passed. 2026-04-29: full no-mock API path passed with Frontend shell reachability, real RAG, and real AutoDL LoRA. 2026-04-29 browser walkthrough passed for Dashboard and Chat against the full no-mock backend, and `docs/DEMO_CHECKLIST.md` now documents the recording flow, expected evidence, and non-blocking gaps. 2026-05-08: Chatbot real matrix passed 14/14 with LoRA-backed intent, LoRA-backed NER, real sentiment, and real RAG. The system is demo-ready for recording; social_media corpus coverage remains a documented non-blocking gap.
gate: Full chat flow works without mocks
Retrieval and sentiment outputs are visible in the system
Known risks are documented in progress.md or session-handoff.md
